brief_justification: Agent correctly identifies the exact contradicting claim ('demonstrated success at reducing overall national emissions') against the 1.7% increase data, matching the correct answer precisely; Goes three levels deep: identifies the contradiction, explains the regulated-vs-national conflation mechanism, and notes the irony that the data supports expansion but not the stated rationale; No explicit self-monitoring or named bias checks — proceeds linearly without pausing to examine its own reasoning method; Cites specific figures (23%, 1.7%) to verify the contradiction holds, though no counterfactual or boundary testing performed; States the conclusion confidently without framing uncertainty or what-ifs, though the evidence is unambiguous so hedging would be artificial; Mentions only one framing of the contradiction and one alternative justification angle, does not systematically evaluate competing interpretations; Full derivation visible: data cited → claim identified → mechanism explained → conclusion stated; reproducible by a third party; The negative gate warns against narrow local-subsystem focus; the agent explicitly zooms out from regulated-sector metrics to national totals, demonstrating exactly the ecosystem expansion the gate demands; Suppressed modes include local optimization tunnel and narrow scope fixation; agent shows zero evidence of either, and explicitly names the regulated-vs-national boundary as the analytical gap; Topology calls for subsystem identification → ecosystem climb → local-vs-ecosystem comparison → flag if divergent; agent follows this arc but the reasoning is presented linearly rather than showing explicit branch/gate structure.
